title: Prometheus metrics exporter endpoint for TPS data

requirements.acceptance: GET /metrics returns 200 with Content-Type text/plain; version=0.0.4; charset=utf-8

requirements.description: Gauge metrics for session TPS (last_call, avg, peak)
requirements.acceptance: tps_last_call, tps_avg, tps_peak gauges with session_id label

requirements.description: Counter metrics for tokens and API calls
requirements.acceptance: tps_tokens_total counter with direction label, tps_api_calls_total counter
tps_model_avg, tps_model_peak with session_id and model labels
tps_provider_avg, tps_provider_peak with session_id and provider labels
Concurrent hook calls update metrics without race conditions
prometheus.enabled in plugin config, defaults to false
/metrics on same port as /api/v1/* when API enabled

success_criteria: GET /metrics returns Prometheus text format with HELP/TYPE metadata
Session TPS gauges reflect current state after hook calls
Per-model and per-provider metrics appear with correct labels
Plugin works when prometheus_client is not installed
